zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome於1420年出生在英國素福爾可布洛時，他的父親John Cornwallis Sr47歲，母親Philippa Buckton43歲。他和Philippe Tyrell至少有1個兒子。他去世於1484年5月24日在英國英格蘭素福爾可歐克麗享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可歐克麗。

nameMeanings.name: Cornwallis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: regional name for someone from Cornwall, a Normanized form of Middle English Cornwalish. Compare Cornwall .

variants.name: Cornwall
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornish
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from the county of Cornwall, from Middle English Cornish, Cornysh formed on the analogy of English, which was usually Normanized as Corneys. Not surprisingly, the surname is common in adjacent Devon, but it is also established as far afield as Suffolk and London.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome was born in 1420, in Brome, Suffolk, England, his father, John Cornwallis Sr, was 47 and his mother, Philippa Buckton, was 43. He had at least 1 son with Philippe Tyrell. He died on 24 May 1484, in Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome est né en 1420, à Brome, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Cornwallis Sr, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Philippa Buckton, avait 43 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Philippe Tyrell. Il est décédé le 24 mai 1484, à Oakley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Oakley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Mai 1484 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome(이)가 1420년 영국 수폴크 브롬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cornwallis Sr(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Buckton(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Philippe Tyrell(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1484년 5월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 클리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome nasceu em 1420, em Brome, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cornwallis Sr, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Buckton, tinha 43 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Philippe Tyrell. Ele faleceu em 24 de maio de 1484, em Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Cornwallis Esquire of Broome родился в 1420 г. в местности бром, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Cornwallis Sr было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Buckton, 43. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Philippe Tyrell. Он умер 24 мая 1484 г. в местности оакли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности оакли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
